/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -O3 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/MoveServo.dir/MoveServo.cpp.o -o MoveServo   -L/home/maciek/Desktop/servo/SCServo_Linux_220329/SCServo_Linux/examples/SMS_STS/MoveServo/../../..  -Wl,-rpath,/home/maciek/Desktop/servo/SCServo_Linux_220329/SCServo_Linux/examples/SMS_STS/MoveServo/../../.. -Wl,-Bstatic -lSCServo -Wl,-Bdynamic
